title: dufrenoya sphaerocarpa
intro: Dufrenoya sphaerocarpa is a plant species native to tropical regions, belonging to the Rutaceae family and characterized by its unique flowers and fruit. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Dufrenoya sphaerocarpa include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional remedies. Herbal preparations of Dufrenoya sphaerocarpa often involve extraction of its essential oils or roots, which can be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
